NATIONAL HIGHWAYS AUTHORITY OF INDIA NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 8th August, 2014 The National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2014 No. NHAI/l1011/17/2012-HT(.I.——In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 35, read» with Section 9, of the National Highways Authority of India Act 1988 (68 of 1988), the National Highways Authority or India hereby makes the following reg-diam m“ the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Regulations, 1996, namely: - ' 1. (1) These regulations may be called the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority and Promotion) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Schedule to the National Highways Authority of India (Recruitment, Seniority & Promotion) Regulations, 1996 (hereinafter referred to as the Principal regulations), the existing criteria prescribed in para-1 (a) of the Col. 8 for the post of Dy. Manager (Tech) for Direct recruitment: “through campus recruitment from the candidates studying Bachelor of Engineering (BE) or Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from the Indian Institutes of Technology (IITs) / National Institutes of Technology (NITs ” "is hereby substituted with the following: “from amongst the candidates, who have appeared in the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE) based on their scores therein duly authenticated by the organizing IIT” SATISH CHANDRA, Member (Finance) [ADVT. III/4/Exty./l 22/14] Foot note: The principal regllations were published vide notification No.NHAR-12011/1/95-Admnt, dated 11th March, 1996, in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III, Section 4, dated the llth March, 1996 and .last amended vide notification No.11012/158/2010-I~IR'.I(V01.II), dated let August, 2013 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part III — Section 4, dated the 26th Augist, 2013. Explanatory Memorandum Anything done or omitted to be done prior to notification of this amendment shall not be affected by promulgation of this amendment. “14 4A2!) do.
